name: Whisper To Input (Android)
postCreateCommand:
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends openjdk-17-jdk-headless unzip curl git ca-certificates python3-pip && npm config set prefix "$HOME/.npm-global" && export PATH="$HOME/.npm-global/bin:$PATH" && npm install -g @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent && printf 'export PATH="$HOME/.npm-global/bin:$PATH"
' >> "$HOME/.bashrc" && sudo ln -sf "$HOME/.npm-global/bin/pi" /usr/local/bin/pi && sudo mkdir -p /opt/android-sdk && sudo chown "$(whoami):$(id -gn)" /opt/android-sdk && cd /tmp && curl -fsS -o cmdtools.zip https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-11076708_latest.zip && unzip -q cmdtools.zip -d /opt/android-sdk/cmdline-tools && mv /opt/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools /opt/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/latest && rm -f cmdtools.zip && export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk && export PATH=/opt/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$PATH && yes | sdkmanager --licenses >/dev/null && sdkmanager "platform-tools" "platforms;android-34" "build-tools;34.0.0" "emulator" "system-images;android-35;default;x86_64" && printf 'export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/opt/android-sdk
export ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk
export ANDROID_PATH=/opt/android-sdk
export PATH=/opt/android-sdk/platform-tools:$PATH
export PATH=/opt/android-sdk/emulator:$PATH
export PATH=/opt/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:$PATH
' | sudo tee /etc/profile.d/android-sdk.sh >/dev/null && echo 'export ANDROID_PATH=/opt/android-sdk' >> "$HOME/.bashrc" && REPO=$(ls -d /workspaces/* 2>/dev/null | head -1) && cd "$REPO" && echo 'sdk.dir=/opt/android-sdk' > android/local.properties && if ! command -v just >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://just.systems/install.sh | bash -s -- --to ~/.local/bin; fi && if ! command -v hs >/dev/null 2>&1; then gh release download v0.1.38 -R elliotgao2/handsets --pattern handsets-linux-x86_64.tar.gz -D /tmp/hs-dl --skip-existing && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && tar xzf /tmp/hs-dl/handsets-linux-x86_64.tar.gz -C ~/.local/bin --strip-components=1; fi && if ! command -v pre-commit >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 -m pip install --user pre-commit; fi && git config --global --add safe.directory '*' && (just setup-hooks || echo 'just setup-hooks failed - run manually if needed')
